description: Опційні MCP-сервери. Скопіюй у .mcp.json ті, які потрібні, або об'єднай через jq.

serena.description: Semantic code search (IDE-like). Install: uvx --from git+https://github.com/oraios/serena serena

spec-workflow.description: Full SDD workflow with web dashboard + VSCode extension (Pimzino)

mcpvault.description: Obsidian vault access (AST-aware). Заміни VAULT_PATH на абсолютний шлях до твого vault.

memory.description: Persistent memory via knowledge graph (Anthropic official)

obsidian-claude-code.description: Obsidian plugin with WebSocket bridge on port 22360. Install plugin in Obsidian first.
